rendered_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
notes: Wave1.0 regression smoke PASS — grok preserves PASS_BLOCKED baseline from #1173 (post-login). Opened grok.com, hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R). Login confirmed: account 'plantynetaitest@gmail.com' shown in sidebar footer, NO 로그인 button present (not FAIL_AUTH). Set PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) into the composer. Submitted (Enter). Within 60s the page rendered the APF warning banner: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' containing expected_text='차단'. URL mutated to grok.com/?rid=00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000002 (apf0-warn marker confirming engine intercept fired). A secondary 'Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다 / 재시도' card appeared below as the downstream effect of the blocked upstream response — the APF warning banner is the primary block indicator. No LLM answer was produced. Behavior matches #1173 PASS_BLOCKED baseline; regression-safe for Wave1.0.
operational_notes: windows-mcp Click/Type loc parameter failed validation (array serialized as string) throughout — composer has no dedicated UIAutomation label and the only labeled element in the input bar is the '첨부' (+) attach button at the left edge (Type label=N clicks it and opens the attach menu). Workaround that worked: Clipboard set → click '새 채팅' (auto-focuses composer) → Ctrl+V paste → Enter. Save this pattern for future grok tests.
